summary: Tested BidBlitzPay.jsx i18n refactoring. All 16 languages are correctly imported from external walletTranslations.js file. Frontend builds without errors. Wallet API returns correct data. Language switcher works correctly with proper translations displayed for all tested languages including RTL support for Arabic.
